phases.title: Money parsing
phases.description: Implement parse_money() in ledger/money.py: parse '<amount> <CCY>' into Money (Decimal amount from str, 3-uppercase-letter currency); return MoneyError('empty'|'malformed'|'bad-currency').
phases.proof: uv run --python 3.13 --with pytest --with hypothesis pytest locked/tests/test_phase1_money.py -q

phases.title: Posting validation
phases.description: Implement make_posting() in ledger/posting.py: account non-empty, side debit/credit, amount strictly positive; else PostingError.
phases.proof: uv run --python 3.13 --with pytest --with hypothesis pytest locked/tests/test_phase2_posting.py -q

phases.title: Entry validation
phases.description: Implement validate_entry() in ledger/entry.py: non-empty, single currency, debits == credits; else EntryError.
phases.proof: uv run --python 3.13 --with pytest --with hypothesis pytest locked/tests/test_phase3_entry.py -q

phases.title: Posting to balances
phases.description: Implement post() in ledger/post.py: fold entries into per-account signed balances (debit +, credit -), sorted by account.
phases.proof: uv run --python 3.13 --with pytest --with hypothesis pytest locked/tests/test_phase4_post.py -q

phases.title: Trial balance + statement
phases.description: Implement is_balanced() and format_statement() in ledger/report.py (deterministic 'account: amount' lines).
phases.proof: uv run --python 3.13 --with pytest --with hypothesis pytest locked/tests/test_phase5_report.py -q

phases.title: Sealed gate
phases.description: Authoritative, tamper-resistant: runs the full pipeline out of process over random journals and compares balances to a trusted oracle. Cannot be faked from inside a test process; passing requires the whole pipeline to be correct.
